basic_details.job_title: GMRC Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 28 Asst. Manager, Supervisor and More Posts
basic_details.post_name: Asst. Manager, Supervisor and More Posts
basic_details.short_information: Gujarat Metro Rail Corporation Limited (GMRC) has published the Various Posts Notification 2026 on 20 May 2026. The recruitment drive aims to fill 28 positions, including Assistant Manager, Supervisor, and Section Engineer roles. Candidates within the age range specified for each post and holding relevant engineering qualifications are eligible to apply online at the official GMRC website. The application process will be active from now until 03 June 2026, and candidates can access the notification PDF and apply link below for full details

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.age_details: Varies by post and category (contract, deputation, post-superannuation). Max age for contract is generally 45 years, for deputation 58 years, and for post-superannuation 62 years.
age_limit.details: General Manager: Contract: 57 years, Deputation: 58 years, Post-superannuation: 62 years Deputy General Manager: Contract: 45 years, Deputation: 58 years, Post-superannuation: 62 years Asst. Manager: Contract: 35 years Supervisor/Section Engineer: Contract: 32 years

qualification.details: General Manager (Traction): Graduate engineering in Electrical/Electrical & Electronics discipline from a Govt. recognized University/Institute with minimum 10 years of relevant post-qualification experience. Deputy General Manager (Operations), Surat: B.E./B. Tech in Electrical / Electronics / Mechanical/ Computer Engineering / Information Technology from a Government recognized University/Institute with minimum 10 years of experience in Train Operations. Deputy General Manager (E&M), O&M, Surat: B.E./B.Tech in Electrical/ Electrical & Electronics / Power Electronics/ Instrumentation or equivalent engineering graduate from a Govt. recognized University/Institute with minimum 10 years of post-qualification experience. Deputy General Manager (Signalling), O&M, Surat: B.E/B.Tech in Electrical/ Electrical & Electronics / Electronics & Telecommunications/Applied Electronics / Industrial Electronics/Power Electronics/ Instrumentation or equivalent engineering graduate from a Govt. recognized University/Institute with minimum 10 years of post-qualification experience. Section Engineer (Track), O&M, Surat: B.E/ B. Tech in Civil Engineering from a Govt. recognized University/ Institute with minimum 5 years of post-qualification relevant experience.

selection_process: Personal Interviews Document Verification Medical Examination
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the GMRC Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 03-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of GMRC to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for GMRC Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application for the GMRC Various Posts Recruitment 2026 is 03-06-2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in GMRC Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are a total of 28 vacancies for Various Posts on Contract/Deputation/Post-Superannuation Basis in GMRC Recruitment 2026.

faq.question: Q3. What is the minimum qualification required for GMRC posts?
faq.answer: The minimum qualification is a graduate engineering degree in relevant disciplines such as Electrical, Electronics, Mechanical, Civil, and IT, with varying years of post-qualification experience.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for applying to GMRC posts?
faq.answer: The age limit varies by post and category. Generally, the maximum age for contract posts is 45 years, for deputation is 58 years, and for post-superannuation is 62 years.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for GMRC posts?
faq.answer: Salaries are offered on IDA scales ranging from ₹40000-125000 to ₹120000-280000, with CTCs ranging from approximately ₹95,000 to ₹3.4 Lacs per month.

faq.question: Q6. How can I apply for the GMRC recruitment?
faq.answer: Interested candidates can apply online through the official GMRC website before the last date of application.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for GMRC recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process typically includes Personal Interviews, Document Verification, and Medical Examination.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee for GMRC recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q9. What type of job roles are available in GMRC recruitment?
faq.answer: The recruitment is for various posts on a Contract, Deputation, or Post-Superannuation basis, primarily in engineering and operational fields.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official GMRC notification?
faq.answer: The official notification can be accessed through the 'Careers' section on the GMRC website or via the direct link provided in the Important Links section of this article.
